action.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a bedroom now. There are a book, a potion recipe, a bed, a wardrobe and a pillow. The book is on the bed. The potion recipe is on the bed. The wardrobe is closed. The pillow is on the floor. There is a passage to a reading room here.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the potion recipe. In your inventory you have a potion recipe.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a reading room now. There are a table, a couch, a side table, a chair and a shelf. There are passages to a conservatory and a garden here.
action.label: context

action.content: This is a shelf. There is nothing on the shelf.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a conservatory now. There are a planting table and a prickly pear. The prickly pear is on the floor. There is a passage to a hallway here.
action.label: context

action.content: This is a prickly pear. The prickly pear is on the floor. The prickly pear is on. The prickly pear is takeable.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the prickly pear. In your inventory you have a prickly pear and a potion recipe.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a hallway now. There are passages to a magic workshop, a reading room, a broom closet and a bedroom here.
action.label: context

action.content: This is a potion recipe. The potion recipe is takeable. The potion recipe is in. There is writing on it. The potion recipe is in the your inventory.
action.label: context

action.content:
You read the potion recipe:
Floorboard potion
Ingredients: Ectoplasm, eye of newt, peach, spider egg.
1. Pour ectoplasm into your cauldron.
2. Add the peach into your cauldron.
3. Wiggle a zulpowand over your cauldron.
4. Use a fairy wand over your cauldron.
5. Add the eye of newt into your cauldron.
6. Put the spider egg into your cauldron.
action.label: context

action.content:
You are in a magic workshop now. There are a fire wand, a workbench, a fairy wand, a orrery, a ice wand and a zulpowand. The fire wand is on the ceiling. The fairy wand is on the ceiling. The ice wand is on the ceiling. The zulpowand is on the ceiling. There are passages to a bedroom and a kitchen here.
Magical experiments have reversed and dampened gravity in this room. You begin to float in the air.
action.label: context

action.content: Your inventory can not hold more than two objects at the same time.
action.label: context

action.content:
You drop the prickly pear on the floor.
The prickly pear floats up to the ceiling.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the zulpowand. In your inventory you have a zulpowand and a potion recipe.
action.label: context

action.content:
You are in a kitchen now. There are a plate, a counter, a cauldron and a cupboard. The plate is on the floor. The cauldron is on the floor. The cupboard is closed. There are passages to a conservatory and a pantry here.
Gravity behaves normally in this room. You stop floating in the air.
action.label: context
